---
title: "CHARM"
---

This chapter documents the Cloud Run workflow for generating CHARM products and derived habitat prediction datasets.

## Purpose

The workflow ingests VIIRS ocean color inputs, applies DINEOF gap-filling and CHARM model logic, and generates gridded bloom prediction products for ERDDAP publication.

The system includes:

- Cloud Run orchestration
- DINEOF configuration management
- CHARM model processing
- NetCDF template generation
- ERDDAP-ready publication

## Repository structure

```text
charm/
├── config/
│   ├── config.yaml                 # Main runtime configuration
│   ├── dineof/                     # Standard DINEOF configurations
│   └── bf_dineof/                  # Backfill DINEOF configurations
├── deploy_job.sh                   # Build, push, and deploy Cloud Run job
├── Dockerfile                      # Container definition
├── entrypoint.sh                   # Cloud Run entrypoint
├── scripts/
│   ├── control_charm_cron_v1.py    # Workflow controller
│   └── make_charm_cloud_v1.py      # Main CHARM processor
├── src/python/
│   ├── charm_data_process_functions.py
│   ├── charm_dineof_functions.py
│   ├── charm_helper_functions.py
│   └── charm_model_functions.py
└── templates/
    ├── charm_3k_grid.nc
    ├── charm2022_out_tmpl.cdf
    ├── themask.nc
    └── viirs_L3.cdl
```

## Cloud Run jobs

The workflow runs as a Cloud Run job built from a shared container image and dispatched through `entrypoint.sh`.

| Component | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `control_charm_cron_v1.py` | Runtime orchestration and scheduling logic |
| `make_charm_cloud_v1.py` | Main CHARM product generation |
| `entrypoint.sh` | Cloud Run startup and mode dispatch |

## Processing pipeline

Each run follows this sequence:

```text
Cloud Scheduler → Cloud Run Job → Download VIIRS inputs → DINEOF gap-filling → CHARM model processing → Apply templates → Publish to GCS → ERDDAP ingestion
```

The controller script manages runtime configuration, date handling, input discovery, and execution of the CHARM processing workflow.

## DINEOF configuration system

The workflow uses multiple DINEOF initialization files for forecast, nowcast, and backfill processing.

Configuration groups are organized by:

- chlorophyll-a
- Rrs_489
- Rrs_556

Separate configurations exist for:

- operational processing
- backfill processing
- forecast generation
- nowcast generation

## Templates and static assets

The workflow uses static NetCDF templates and mask/grid assets to standardize output structure and metadata.

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `charm_3k_grid.nc` | CHARM output grid definition |
| `charm2022_out_tmpl.cdf` | CHARM NetCDF output template |
| `themask.nc` | Processing mask |
| `viirs_L3.cdl` | VIIRS Level-3 CDL template |

## Codebase {.unnumbered}

```{=html}
<div class="file-grid">

<div class="file-card">
<h3>Deployment</h3>
<p>Container and Cloud Run deployment configuration.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/dockerfile.html">Dockerfile</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/entrypoint.html">entrypoint.sh</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/delpoy_job.html">delpoy_job.sh</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/config.html">config.yaml</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/requirements.html">requirements.txt</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>Workflow scripts</h3>
<p>Main CHARM orchestration and processing.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/control_charm_cron_v1.html">control_charm_cron_v1.py</a> - workflow controller</li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/make_charm_cloud_v1.html">make_charm_cloud_v1.py</a> - primary CHARM processor</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>Model and helper libraries</h3>
<p>Supporting processing, DINEOF, and model utilities.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/charm_data_process_functions.html">charm_data_process_functions.py</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/charm_dineof_functions.html">charm_dineof_functions.py</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/charm_helper_functions.html">charm_helper_functions.py</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/charm_model_functions.html">charm_model_functions.py</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>DINEOF configuration</h3>
<p>Forecast, nowcast, and backfill initialization files.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/for_chlor_a_v4.html">for_chlor_a_v4.init</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/now_chlor_a_v4.html">now_chlor_a_v4.init</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/for_Rrs_489_v4.html">for_Rrs_489_v4.init</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/now_Rrs_489_v4.html">now_Rrs_489_v4.init</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/for_Rrs_556_v4.html">for_Rrs_556_v4.init</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/now_Rrs_556_v4.html">now_Rrs_556_v4.init</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>Backfill DINEOF configuration</h3>
<p>Backfill forecast and nowcast initialization files.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/for_bf_chlor_a_v4.html">for_bf_chlor_a_v4.init</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/now_bf_chlor_a_v4.html">now_bf_chlor_a_v4.init</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/for_bf_Rrs_489_v4.html">for_bf_Rrs_489_v4.init</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/now_bf_Rrs_489_v4.html">now_bf_Rrs_489_v4.init</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/for_bf_Rrs_556_v4.html">for_bf_Rrs_556_v4.init</a></li>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/now_bf_Rrs_556_v4.html">now_bf_Rrs_556_v4.init</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="file-card">
<h3>Templates and static assets</h3>
<p>Reference templates, masks, and static grid assets.</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="code-pages/charm/viirs_L3.html">viirs_L3.cdl</a></li>
<li>charm_3k_grid.nc</li>
<li>charm2022_out_tmpl.cdf</li>
<li>themask.nc</li>
</ul>
</div>

</div>
```
